<style type="text/css">
body, input, textarea { font-family: "Segoe UI", Verdana, "游ゴシック", YuGothic, "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", Meiryo, sans-serif; }
.rich_font { font-family: "Hiragino Sans", "ヒラギノ角ゴ ProN", "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "游ゴシック", YuGothic, "メイリオ", Meiryo, sans-serif; font-weight: 100;
}

body { font-size:15px; }

.pc #header .logo { font-size:24px; }
.mobile #header .logo { font-size:18px; }
#footer_logo .logo { font-size:24px; }

#header_images .grid-item .image img, .index_box_list .image img, #index_blog_list li .image img, #post_list li .image img, #related_post li a.image img, .styled_post_list1 .image img, #program_list .program .image img, ul.banner_list1 li .image img, ul.banner_list2 li .image img, .footer_banner .image img, .header_image .image img {
-webkit-transform: scale(1);
-webkit-transition-property: opacity, scale, -webkit-transform;
-webkit-transition: 0.35s;
-moz-transform: scale(1);
-moz-transition-property: opacity, scale, -moz-transform;
-moz-transition: 0.35s;
-ms-transform: scale(1);
-ms-transition-property: opacity, scale, -ms-transform;
-ms-transition: 0.35s;
-o-transform: scale(1);
-o-transition-property: opacity, scale, -o-transform;
-o-transition: 0.35s;
transform: scale(1);
transition-property: opacity, scale, -webkit-transform;
transition: 0.35s;
-webkit-backface-visibility:hidden; backface-visibility:hidden;
}

.post_content h2 {
  position: relative;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  text-align: center;
 margin-bottom: 40px;
 font-size:200%;
font-weight:bold;
}
.post_content h2:before {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -10px;
  left: calc(50% - 30px);
  width: 60px;
  height: 5px;
  content: '';
  border-radius: 3px;
  background: #0E79DC;
}
.post_content h3 {
  padding: 1rem 2rem;
  border-left: 5px solid #0E79DC;
  background: #f4f4f4;
 margin: 30px 0px;
font-weight:bold;

.post_content h4{
font-weight:bold;

.post_content ul{

  list-style-type:none;

  padding:0;
}
.post_content ul li{

  font-weight: bold;
  font-size:14px;
  line-height: 30px;
  border-bottom: dashed 1px #53BD7D;
}
.post_content ul li:before{
  counter-increment: list;
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0px;
  height: 10px;
  width: 10px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #53BD7D;
  top: 50%;
  -moz-transform: translateY(-50%);
  -webkit-transform: translateY(-50%);
  -o-transform: translateY(-50%);
  -ms-transform: translateY(-50%);
  transform: translateY(-50%);
}

                                <div class="p-recruit__infoInner">
                                    <ul class="p-recruit__infoCatList c-flex">
<li class="p-recruit__infoCatItem"><a href="https://www.group-sanwa.co.jp/work_location/area04" class="c-btn_cat--cat01">各務原市</a></li><li class="p-recruit__infoCatItem"><a href="https://www.group-sanwa.co.jp/occupation/cat02_01" class="c-btn_cat--cat02">清掃</a></li><li class="p-recruit__infoCatItem"><a href="https://www.group-sanwa.co.jp/working_time/cat03_02" class="c-btn_cat--cat03">パートタイム</a></li><li class="p-recruit__infoCatItem"><a href="https://www.group-sanwa.co.jp/other/cat04_03" class="c-btn_cat--cat04">交通費支給</a></li><li class="p-recruit__infoCatItem"><a href="https://www.group-sanwa.co.jp/other/cat04_06" class="c-btn_cat--cat04">制服あり</a></li><li class="p-recruit__infoCatItem"><a href="https://www.group-sanwa.co.jp/other/cat04_05" class="c-btn_cat--cat04">土日祝休み</a></li><li class="p-recruit__infoCatItem"><a href="https://www.group-sanwa.co.jp/other/cat04_08" class="c-btn_cat--cat04">未経験OK</a></li><li class="p-recruit__infoCatItem"><a href="https://www.group-sanwa.co.jp/other/cat04_02" class="c-btn_cat--cat04">車通勤OK</a></li>                                    </ul>

                                <dl class="p-recruit__contents">

                                <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">求人NO.</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">116</dd>
                                    </div>

                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">職種</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">日常清掃</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">給与</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">時給1,115円</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">勤務地</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes"><p>〒504-0814　岐阜県各務原市蘇原興亜町1丁目1<br>ウィングフィールド株式会社<p></dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">勤務時間</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">交代制(シフト制)　<br />
①8：00～11：00<br />
②8：30～11：30<br />
③8：00～11：30<br />
④13：15～16：45</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">休日</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">土日、夏季、年末年始　※工場の年間休日カレンダーによる<br />
週休二日制</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">待遇</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">交通費支給（月額上限13,000円）</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">仕事情報</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">〇各務原市蘇原のウィングフィールド株式会社での日常清掃のお仕事です。(週2日程度の勤務)<br />
・玄関ホール、廊下、階段、食堂、手洗い場、建物周りの清掃。<br />
・軽ワゴン車で敷地内のごみ回収。<br />
・特殊な機械等は使用しません。</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">事業内容</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">ビル総合管理　1.清掃業務　2.管理業務　3.サービス業務　4.警備保障業務　5.環境測定業務　6.害虫駆除業務　7.公の施設管理・運営</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">必要資格</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">不問</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">その他</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">清掃のお仕事が未経験の方でも安心して始められます。<br />
</dd>
                                    </div>
                                </dl>

                                <h4 class="p-recruit__smalltitle c-title__small">ご応募について</h4>
                                <dl class="p-recruit__contents02">
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">選考方法</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">面接（履歴書持参、予定1回）</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">
                                        <dt class="p-recruit__contentsTitle">応募方法</dt>
                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">応募フォームまたはお電話にて応募ください。</dd>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="p-recruit__contentsInner c-flex">

                                        <dd class="p-recruit__contentsDes">応募→面接（履歴書持参）→就業</dd>
                                    </div>

担当：中野</dd>

<script>

jQuery(document).ready(function($){
      
    if ($('.animation_element').size()) {
      $(window).on('load scroll resize', function(){
        $('.animation_element:not(.active)').each(function(){
          var setThis = $(this);
          var elmTop = setThis.offset().top;
          var elmHeight = setThis.height();
          var scrTop = $(window).scrollTop();
          var winHeight = $(window).height();
          if (scrTop > elmTop - winHeight){
            setThis.addClass('active');
          }
        });
      }).trigger('resize');
    }
  
});
</script>
